name: Ram-On Investments and Holdings (1999) Ltd
summary: Ram-On Investments and Holdings (1999) Ltd develops, manufactures, and markets engineering thermoplastic compounds. The company provides adhesives and enhancers. It also engages in the building rental business. It primarily serves irrigation, automotive, electrical appliances, and electronic accessories industries in Israel, the United States, and Europe. The company was formerly known as Poliram (1999) Ltd and changed its name to Ram-On Investments and Holdings (1999) Ltd in September 2015. Ram-On Investments and Holdings (1999) Ltd was incorporated in 1999 and is based in Gilboa, Israel.
